title: gentianella hirculus
intro: Gentianella hirculus, also known as yellow gentian or lesser yellow gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family that is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues and infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and soothing respiratory issues. Gentianella hirculus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine, particularly in Eastern European and Asian cultures.
